issue.title: Frontend: Share Card Phase 1 — segment copy, WhatsApp-first, enhanced OG, PNG improvements, analytics
issue.description:
## Context

Parent spec: [TESA-154](/TESA/issues/TESA-154#document-plan) — Shareable Results Card design.

This task covers Phase 1 of the shareable card enhancements. Phase 1 has NO blockers — it ships with null-segment fallbacks.

## Scope

### 1A. Create `src/data/share-copy.ts`
- `ShareCopy` type: `{ shareText: string, cardSubtitle: string, landingCTA: string, compareText: string }`
- `getShareCopy(segment: Segment | null): ShareCopy` — returns segment-specific copy or default
- Segment copy strings (from TESA-154 spec):
  - University: shareText = I just discovered my top strengths — and they match careers I never considered. Take the free test:
  - Early Career: shareText = Turns out my personality type explains why certain roles drain me. Take the free test:
  - Plateaued: shareText = I found my leadership gap — and it was not what I expected. Take the free test:
  - Midlife: shareText = My strengths pointed to a career I never thought about. Take the free test:
  - 55+: shareText = I just mapped my strengths at 55 — and got clarity on what comes next. Take the free test:
  - Solopreneur: shareText = The test told me my blind spot as a founder. Wish I knew this sooner. Take the free test:
  - Default (null): shareText = I just discovered my top 5 strengths — and they changed how I think about my career. Take the free test:
- Card subtitles: University=Your career starts here, Early Career=Find your edge, Plateaued=Close your leadership gap, Midlife=What is next for you?, 55+=Your next chapter starts here, Solopreneur=Know your blind spots, Default=One Test. Four Frameworks.
- All strings must be wrapped in `t()` for i18n (use `src/i18n/`)
- Import `Segment` type from `src/data/segments.ts` (created in TESA-149)
- If segments.ts does not exist yet, define a local `type Segment = "student" | "early_career" | "plateaued" | "midlife" | "late_career" | "solopreneur"` as a placeholder

### 1B. Modify `src/components/ShareCard.tsx`
- Add optional `segment` prop (type `Segment | null`, default `null`)
- Import `getShareCopy` from share-copy.ts
- Render segment subtitle below personality type (above top 5)
- Subtitle styling: centered, italic, lighter color, small font
- If segment is null, render default tagline: One Test. Four Frameworks.

### 1C. Modify `api/og-image.ts`
- Accept `segment` query param (optional)
- If segment provided, render subtitle text between personality type and strength/strength card area
- Segment-specific footer CTA:
  - Default: Take the free test — 1test.me
  - University: Start your career right — 1test.me
  - Plateaued: Discover your leadership gap — 1test.me
  - etc. (map from share-copy.ts values)
- Maintain backward compatibility: no segment param = current behavior unchanged

### 1D. Modify `src/components/ShareButtons.tsx`
- Reorder SHARE_CHANNELS: WhatsApp first, then Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Copy
- Add emoji to WhatsApp default text prefix
- Import and use `getShareCopy(segment)` for share text generation
- Add `segment` prop to ShareButtons component

### 1E. Modify `src/hooks/useShareImage.ts`
- Accept `personalityType` string prop
- Default filename: `1test-{personalityType}-results.png`
- Keep existing `1test-results.png` as fallback if no type provided
- Add `trackShareCardDownloaded(personalityType, segment)` on download

### 1F. Add analytics events to `src/utils/analytics.ts`
- `trackShareCardViewed(personalityType: string, segment: string | null)`
- `trackShareCardShared(channel: string, personalityType: string, segment: string | null)`
- `trackShareCardDownloaded(personalityType: string, segment: string | null)`
- Wire these up in ResultsScreen.tsx:
  - `trackShareCardViewed` on share section mount (useEffect)
  - `trackShareCardShared` called by each ShareButtons click
  - `trackShareCardDownloaded` called by useShareImage download

### 1G. Modify `src/components/ResultsScreen.tsx`
- Pass `segment` prop to ShareCard
- Pass `segment` and derived `shareText` to ShareButtons
- Add share card viewed analytics event on mount

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `src/data/share-copy.ts` exists with all 7 segment variants + default
- [ ] ShareCard renders segment subtitle when segment provided
- [ ] OG image includes segment subtitle and CTA when segment param present
- [ ] OG image backward compatible (no segment = current layout)
- [ ] WhatsApp is first button in share row
- [ ] Downloaded PNG filename includes personality type
- [ ] All 3 analytics events fire correctly
- [ ] No trademarked names
- [ ] All new strings are i18n-ready (wrapped in t())
- [ ] Works with segment=null (graceful fallback)

## Dependencies

- Parent: [TESA-154](/TESA/issues/TESA-154)
- TESA-149/150 (segments): Not blocked — use null fallback until segments land

ancestors.title: Design: Shareable Results Card — viral sharing + OG image + segment-specific messaging

goal.title: AI-operated personality intelligence platform. One free test, four frameworks (Strengths, 16 Personalities, DISC, Enneagram), personalized growth paths. $3M ARR in 12 months with zero human employees.
